scenario.name: KubeVoIP Trusted Trunk Call
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:100@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: trunk <sip:+61200000000@trunk.example>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:100@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:trunk@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=trunk 1 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:100@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: trunk <sip:+61200000000@trunk.example>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:100@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:trunk@[local_ip]:[local_port]> [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
